case_title: KATHERINE M. CHIN VS. JOHN EID ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF CHIN, KATHERINE M.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, KATHERINE M.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KATHERINE M CHIN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS KEVIN CHIN AND WITNESS KERRY CHIN. DEFENDANT JOHN EID IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANNA CELLI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, KATHERINE M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EID, JOHN CELLI, ANNA PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHIN, KATHERINE M. AS TO DEFENDANT EID, JOHN CELLI, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
